title: Run the WakeTask existing-app UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro with durabl...

goal.value: Run the WakeTask existing-app UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro with durable research, implementation evidence, hosted-runtime blocker capture, and postmortem learning.

inputs.design_goal: Make WakeTask a highly polished task-based alarm app with Apple Clock-like familiarity, obvious task selection, real wired dismiss missions, loud sounds, funny visual viral tasks, completion reward and share moments, and spec build eval loops.
inputs.target_audience: heavy sleepers and professionals who need an alarm they cannot dismiss without meaningful wake-up engagement

env.UX_TARGET_AUDIENCE: heavy sleepers and professionals who need an alarm they cannot dismiss without meaningful wake-up engagement

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String: mkdir -p .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research; node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='.workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research/reference-pack.json'; const pack=fs.existsSync(path)?JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')):{}; const refs=pack.references||pack.reference_pack?.references||[]; const report={ok:true,total_references:refs.length,needs_live_research:refs.length<12,missing:['competitor_flow_research','app_store_review_mining','mobbin_mcp_research','pageflows_research','apple_hig_research','behavioral_ux_research'],railway_fabro_required:true}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research/reference-gap-analysis.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report));"

secret_policy.String: never print environment variables or credential values; credential checks must be presence-only true/false checks; do not run environment dump commands; Mobbin and competitor screenshots are private research references only.

goal.String: Run the WakeTask existing-app UX Studio implementation workflow through Railway Fabro with durable research, implementation evidence, hosted-runtime blocker capture, and postmortem learning.

spec.graph_source:
digraph IterateExistingAppUX {
    graph [
        goal="Iterate on an existing iPhone app UX with private design research, adversarial design directions, hosted iOS validation, and postmortem learning capture",
        persona="iphone-app-ux-studio",
        secret_policy="never print environment variables or credential values; credential checks must be presence-only true/false checks; do not run environment dump commands; Mobbin and competitor screenshots are private research references only.",
        inputs="repo_url,base_branch,run_branch,app_name,bundle_id,app_dir,app_domain,target_audience,design_goal,max_competitors,use_mobbin_mcp,use_design_corpus,design_corpus_write_mode,selected_direction_mode,ios_validation_mode,allow_macos_deferred,fabro_server",
        outputs="existing_app_intake,reference_pack,design_tournament,screen_spec,ux_implementation_evidence,screenshot_manifest,appium_report,ios_quality_report,ux_handoff,postmortem",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="design_tournament_consensus",
        fallback_retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        model_stylesheet="
            *                  { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .ux-research       { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: medium; }
            .design            { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .critique          { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review            { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .verify            { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: medium; }
            .security          { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    remote_environment_preflight [
        label="Remote Railway/Daytona Preflight",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="remote_environment_preflight",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ux-studio-preflight.mjs --server https://fabro-maestro-production.up.railway.app/api/v1 --expected-control-plane railway"
    ]
    checkout_existing_app [
        label="Checkout Existing App",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="checkout_existing_app",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/checkout-existing-app.mjs"
    ]

    existing_app_intake [
        label="Existing App Intake",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="existing_app_intake",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-existing-app-intake.md --stage existing-app-intake --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/existing-app-intake.json"
    ]
    baseline_screenshot_capture [
        label="Baseline Screenshot Capture",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="existing_app_intake",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-baseline-screenshot-capture.md --stage baseline-screenshot-capture --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/baseline-screenshot-capture.json"
    ]
    design_corpus_preflight [
        label="Design Corpus Preflight",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_corpus_preflight",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/design-corpus.mjs init --db .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/design-corpus.sqlite"
    ]
    retrieve_existing_references [
        label="Retrieve Existing References",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_corpus_preflight",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research; node scripts/iphone-app-factory/design-corpus.mjs reference-pack --db .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/design-corpus.sqlite > .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research/reference-pack.json"
    ]
    reference_gap_analysis [
        label="Reference Gap Analysis",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="retrieve_existing_references",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research; node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const path='.workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research/reference-pack.json'; const pack=fs.existsSync(path)?JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')):{}; const refs=pack.references||pack.reference_pack?.references||[]; const report={ok:true,total_references:refs.length,needs_live_research:refs.length<12,missing:['competitor_flow_research','app_store_review_mining','mobbin_mcp_research','pageflows_research','apple_hig_research','behavioral_ux_research'],railway_fabro_required:true}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/research/reference-gap-analysis.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report));\""
    ]

    research_fanout [label="Research Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=6]
    competitor_flow_research [
        label="Competitor Flow Research",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-competitor-flow-research.md --stage competitor-flow-research --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/competitor-flow-research.json"
    ]
    app_store_review_mining [
        label="App Store Review Mining",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-app-store-review-mining.md --stage app-store-review-mining --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/app-store-review-mining.json"
    ]
    mobbin_mcp_research [
        label="Mobbin MCP Research",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="mobbin_mcp_research",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-mobbin-mcp-research.md --stage mobbin-mcp-research --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/mobbin-mcp-research.json && node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ensure-mobbin-research-artifact.mjs"
    ]
    pageflows_research [
        label="Pageflows Research",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-pageflows-research.md --stage pageflows-research --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/pageflows-research.json"
    ]
    apple_hig_research [
        label="Apple HIG Research",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-apple-hig-research.md --stage apple-hig-research --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/apple-hig-research.json"
    ]
    behavioral_ux_research [
        label="Behavioral UX Research",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-behavioral-research.md --stage behavioral-ux-research --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/behavioral-ux-research.json"
    ]
    research_join [label="Research Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    design_opportunity_synthesis [
        label="Design Opportunity Synthesis",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="research_fanout",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-opportunity-synthesis.md --stage design-opportunity-synthesis --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/design-opportunity-synthesis.json"
    ]
    reference_pack_gate [
        label="Reference Pack Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="research_fanout",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/reference-pack-gate.mjs"
    ]

    design_direction_fanout [label="Design Direction Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=4]
    calm_accountability_direction [
        label="Calm Accountability Direction",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-direction-candidate.md --stage calm_accountability_direction --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/calm-accountability-direction.json"
    ]
    hard_wake_direction [
        label="Hard Wake Direction",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-direction-candidate.md --stage hard_wake_direction --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/hard-wake-direction.json"
    ]
    gamified_streak_direction [
        label="Gamified Streak Direction",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-direction-candidate.md --stage gamified_streak_direction --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/gamified-streak-direction.json"
    ]
    minimal_native_direction [
        label="Minimal Native Direction",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-direction-candidate.md --stage minimal_native_direction --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/minimal-native-direction.json"
    ]
    design_direction_join [label="Design Direction Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    design_cross_critique [
        label="Design Cross Critique",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_direction_fanout",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-cross-critique.md --stage design-cross-critique --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/design-cross-critique.json"
    ]
    design_tournament_consensus [
        label="Design Tournament Consensus",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_direction_fanout",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-design-tournament-consensus.md --stage design-tournament-consensus --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/design-tournament-consensus.json"
    ]
    design_tournament_gate [
        label="Design Tournament Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_direction_fanout",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/design-tournament-gate.mjs"
    ]
    screen_ux_spec [
        label="Screen UX Spec",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="design_tournament_consensus",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-screen-spec.md --stage screen-ux-spec --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/screen-ux-spec.json"
    ]
    implementation_plan_gate [
        label="Implementation Plan Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="screen_ux_spec",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-implementation-plan.md --stage implementation-plan --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/implementation-plan.json"
    ]

    implement_visual_system [
        label="Implement Visual System",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_visual_system",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-implement-visual-system.md --stage visual-system --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/visual-system.json"
    ]
    verify_visual_system [
        label="Verify Visual System",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_visual_system",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-verify-phase.md --stage verify-visual-system --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/verify-visual-system.json"
    ]
    gate_visual_system [label="Visual System Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_visual_system", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs visual-system"]

    implement_screen_flows [
        label="Implement Screen Flows",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-implement-screen-flows.md --stage screen-flows --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/screen-flows.json"
    ]
    verify_screen_flows [
        label="Verify Screen Flows",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-verify-phase.md --stage verify-screen-flows --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/verify-screen-flows.json"
    ]
    gate_screen_flows [label="Screen Flows Gate", shape=parallelogram, goal_gate=true, retry_target="implement_screen_flows", script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/phase-evidence-gate.mjs screen-flows"]

    screenshot_evidence_review [
        label="Screenshot Evidence Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-screenshot-evidence-review.md --stage screenshot-evidence-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/screenshot-evidence-review.json"
    ]
    screenshot_evidence_gate [
        label="Screenshot Evidence Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ios-screenshot-manifest-gate.mjs --manifest reports/ios/screenshots/manifest.json --phase after --require-before-after true"
    ]
    ios_runtime_evidence_preflight [
        label="iOS Runtime Evidence Preflight",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="postmortem_learning_capture",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ios-runtime-evidence-preflight.mjs --success-on-blocker --manifest reports/ios/screenshots/manifest.json"
    ]
    appium_exploratory_gate [
        label="Appium Exploratory Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/appium-report-gate.mjs"
    ]
    ios_quality_gate [
        label="iOS Quality Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ios-ci-gate.mjs"
    ]
    prompt_context_budget_gate [
        label="UX Prompt Context Budget Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="screen_ux_spec",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/prompt-context-budget-gate.mjs --root .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/prompt-context-budget.json"
    ]

    final_review_fanout [label="Final Review Fan-Out", shape=component, join_policy="wait_all", max_parallel=6]
    ux_quality_review [
        label="UX Quality Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-review-ux-quality.md --stage ux-quality-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/ux-quality-review.json"
    ]
    product_fidelity_review [
        label="Product Fidelity Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-product-fidelity.md --stage product-fidelity-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/product-fidelity-review.json"
    ]
    ios_architecture_review [
        label="iOS Architecture Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-ios-architecture.md --stage ios-architecture-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/ios-architecture-review.json"
    ]
    accessibility_review [
        label="Accessibility Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-review-accessibility.md --stage accessibility-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/accessibility-review.json"
    ]
    security_privacy_review [
        label="Security Privacy Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-security-privacy.md --stage security-privacy-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/security-privacy-review.json"
    ]
    release_readiness_review [
        label="Release Readiness Review",
        shape=parallelogram,
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/review-release-readiness.md --stage release-readiness-review --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/release-readiness-review.json"
    ]
    final_review_join [label="Final Review Join", shape=tripleoctagon, join_policy="wait_all"]
    ux_final_review_gate [
        label="UX Final Review Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement_screen_flows",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ux-final-review-gate.mjs"
    ]
    final_consensus [
        label="Final Consensus",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="final_review_fanout",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-final-consensus.md --stage final-consensus --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/final-consensus.json"
    ]
    publish_handoff [
        label="Publish Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="final_consensus",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/publish-handoff.mjs"
    ]
    postmortem_learning_capture [
        label="Postmortem Learning Capture",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="postmortem_learning_capture",
        timeout="3600s",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/ux-postmortem-learning-capture.md --stage postmortem-learning-capture --out .workflow/iphone-app-ux-studio/codex/postmortem-learning-capture.json"
    ]
    postmortem_gate [
        label="Postmortem Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="postmortem_learning_capture",
        script="node scripts/iphone-app-factory/ux-postmortem-gate.mjs"
    ]

    start -> remote_environment_preflight
    remote_environment_preflight -> checkout_existing_app [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    remote_environment_preflight -> remote_environment_preflight [label="Retry Railway Preflight"]
    checkout_existing_app -> existing_app_intake [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    checkout_existing_app -> remote_environment_preflight [label="Fix Checkout"]

    existing_app_intake -> baseline_screenshot_capture [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    existing_app_intake -> existing_app_intake [label="Retry Intake"]
    baseline_screenshot_capture -> design_corpus_preflight [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    baseline_screenshot_capture -> existing_app_intake [label="Retry Baseline"]
    design_corpus_preflight -> retrieve_existing_references [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    design_corpus_preflight -> remote_environment_preflight [label="Fix Environment"]
    retrieve_existing_references -> reference_gap_analysis [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    retrieve_existing_references -> design_corpus_preflight [label="Retry Corpus"]
    reference_gap_analysis -> research_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    reference_gap_analysis -> retrieve_existing_references [label="Retry Corpus"]

    research_fanout -> competitor_flow_research
    research_fanout -> app_store_review_mining
    research_fanout -> mobbin_mcp_research
    research_fanout -> pageflows_research
    research_fanout -> apple_hig_research
    research_fanout -> behavioral_ux_research
    competitor_flow_research -> research_join
    app_store_review_mining -> research_join
    mobbin_mcp_research -> research_join
    pageflows_research -> research_join
    apple_hig_research -> research_join
    behavioral_ux_research -> research_join
    research_join -> design_opportunity_synthesis
    design_opportunity_synthesis -> reference_pack_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    design_opportunity_synthesis -> research_fanout [label="Research Fix"]
    reference_pack_gate -> design_direction_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    reference_pack_gate -> research_fanout [label="Fill Reference Gaps"]

    design_direction_fanout -> calm_accountability_direction
    design_direction_fanout -> hard_wake_direction
    design_direction_fanout -> gamified_streak_direction
    design_direction_fanout -> minimal_native_direction
    calm_accountability_direction -> design_direction_join
    hard_wake_direction -> design_direction_join
    gamified_streak_direction -> design_direction_join
    minimal_native_direction -> design_direction_join
    design_direction_join -> design_cross_critique
    design_cross_critique -> design_tournament_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    design_cross_critique -> design_direction_fanout [label="Retry Directions"]
    design_tournament_consensus -> design_tournament_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    design_tournament_consensus -> design_direction_fanout [label="Retry Tournament"]
    design_tournament_gate -> screen_ux_spec [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    design_tournament_gate -> design_direction_fanout [label="Weak Design"]
    screen_ux_spec -> implementation_plan_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    screen_ux_spec -> screen_ux_spec [label="Spec Fix"]
    implementation_plan_gate -> implement_visual_system [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implementation_plan_gate -> screen_ux_spec [label="Mapping Fix"]

    implement_visual_system -> verify_visual_system [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_visual_system -> implement_visual_system [label="Retry Visual System"]
    verify_visual_system -> gate_visual_system [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_visual_system -> implement_visual_system [label="Fix Visual System"]
    gate_visual_system -> implement_screen_flows [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_visual_system -> implement_visual_system [label="Fix Visual System"]

    implement_screen_flows -> verify_screen_flows [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement_screen_flows -> implement_screen_flows [label="Retry Screen Flows"]
    verify_screen_flows -> gate_screen_flows [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify_screen_flows -> implement_screen_flows [label="Fix Screen Flows"]
    gate_screen_flows -> screenshot_evidence_review [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    gate_screen_flows -> implement_screen_flows [label="Fix Screen Flows"]
    screenshot_evidence_review -> ios_runtime_evidence_preflight [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    screenshot_evidence_review -> implement_screen_flows [label="Screenshot Review Fix"]
    ios_runtime_evidence_preflight -> postmortem_learning_capture [condition="outcome=succeeded", label="iOS Runtime Blocker"]
    ios_runtime_evidence_preflight -> postmortem_learning_capture [label="Unexpected iOS Preflight Failure"]
    screenshot_evidence_gate -> appium_exploratory_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    screenshot_evidence_gate -> implement_screen_flows [label="Screenshot Fix"]
    appium_exploratory_gate -> ios_quality_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    appium_exploratory_gate -> implement_screen_flows [label="Appium Fix"]
    ios_quality_gate -> prompt_context_budget_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ios_quality_gate -> implement_screen_flows [label="CI Fix"]
    prompt_context_budget_gate -> final_review_fanout [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    prompt_context_budget_gate -> screen_ux_spec [label="Compact Context"]

    final_review_fanout -> ux_quality_review
    final_review_fanout -> product_fidelity_review
    final_review_fanout -> ios_architecture_review
    final_review_fanout -> accessibility_review
    final_review_fanout -> security_privacy_review
    final_review_fanout -> release_readiness_review
    ux_quality_review -> final_review_join
    product_fidelity_review -> final_review_join
    ios_architecture_review -> final_review_join
    accessibility_review -> final_review_join
    security_privacy_review -> final_review_join
    release_readiness_review -> final_review_join
    final_review_join -> ux_final_review_gate
    ux_final_review_gate -> final_consensus [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    ux_final_review_gate -> implement_screen_flows [label="UX Fix"]
    final_consensus -> publish_handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    final_consensus -> final_review_fanout [label="Review Fix"]
    publish_handoff -> postmortem_learning_capture [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_handoff -> final_consensus [label="Handoff Fix"]
    postmortem_learning_capture -> postmortem_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    postmortem_learning_capture -> postmortem_learning_capture [label="Retry Postmortem"]
    postmortem_gate -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    postmortem_gate -> postmortem_learning_capture [label="Complete Postmortem"]
}
